title: Wilderness
description: Well optimized Vanilla+ modpack with great exploration experience
body:
# Wilderness
**Its well optimized Vanilla+ experience modpack with cool features many new structures, biomes, armors, mobs and cool features.**
### Optimization
This modpacks use many Optimizing mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore etc. also there are pre-setted settings which are well optimized.
### Shaders
You have two versions of shaders which are pre-installed both of them are 
[Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) 1st version is optimized for higher fps rates and other one is focussing on better visuality.
### Optifine features
You have Optifine features on fabric loader like connected textures, entity textures, animated textures etc.
### Fabric loader
Wilderness uses lighweight, fast and optimized mod loader "Fabric".
### You choose what you do
This modpack doesn't tell you what to do
### Community
If you have any questions about modpack ask on [Discord](https://discord.gg/jd6NZqR9) we will be on way to help you!
### QOL
Adding many of Quality Of Live changes like jei with addons, tweaks, boat item view, stacking xp orbs, shulker box tooltip etc.
